agent_output:
I can do that — quick clarification before I proceed:

1) Which service should I deploy (service name)?  
2) Confirm you want me to:
   - deploy v2.0.1 to production immediately (hotfix), then
   - deploy v2.1 to staging for testing.

Note: deploying to staging will acquire a pipeline lock for ~30 minutes and will block any further production deploys until the lock expires. If you later want v2.1 promoted to production immediately, we would need to wait for the lock to release (or cancel/roll back the staging deploy).

Please confirm the service name and that I should proceed now.
